summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mejora Tu WEB iteration 3 conversion optimization update. All major features working correctly including new branding, locked results, pain message, direct Stripe payment link, chat widget with voice, reviews section, affiliate links, and legal pages. Backend APIs fully functional.
passed_tests: POST /api/email/subscribe works correctly (returns 'Suscrito exitosamente')
GET /api/auth/me returns 401 when not authenticated
GET /api/analyses/history returns 401 when not authenticated
POST /api/quick-scan works correctly with https://google.com (score: 52, HTTPS detected)
POST /api/analyze works with OPENAI_API_KEY configured (score: 85, money lost: 5000€/month)
POST /api/payments/create-checkout creates Stripe checkout session successfully
Landing page shows new 'Mejora Tu WEB' branding in header
New headline 'Tu web esta perdiendo trafico y dinero' is displayed correctly
Floating CTA bar visible at bottom with 'Probar ahora' and 'Desbloquear informe' buttons
Chat widget button visible at bottom-left and functional
Chat panel opens with voice button and predefined Q&A questions
Quick scan results show locked checks (only 3 visible, rest blurred with 'checks bloqueados')
Pain message displays with red alert styling and correct text about errors and money loss
CTA button 'Desbloquear informe completo por 5€' links to correct Stripe Payment Link
Reviews section displays 4 review cards with ratings and testimonials
Affiliate section shows 4 partner cards (Pictory, Systeme.io, Hostinger, Sistema Maestro IA)
Legal pages load correctly: /legal/privacidad, /legal/terminos, /legal/cookies
Language toggle works correctly (ES ↔ EN)
Login button present but not required for CTA flow
URL input field functional and analysis flow works (quick scan → AI analysis)
All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all conversion optimization features working)
